TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Yofayof no TayPakayto Tingsikiw no 'Amis itokay. Onini a kasalalifet i, o pirayray to serangawan no 'Amis, naiti:ya ho tangasa i matini, mafiyorto ko icowacowa:ay a kiwkay, mapasadak to ko matiniay a likakawa, mara^ked mahacecay ko faloco' no singcia.
S.PHON: jo~ufajo~uf no~u tajpakajto~u tiŋsikiw no~u ʡamis ito~ukaj. o~unini a kasaɾaɾifət i, o~u pirajraj to~u səraŋawan no~u ʡamis, naiti:ja ħo~u taŋasa i matini, mafijo~urto~u ko~u iʦo~uwaʦo~uwa:aj a kiwkaj, mapasaɬ~ɮak to~u ko~u matiniaj a ɾikakawa, maraʔkəɬ~ɮ maħaʦəʦaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u siŋʦia.
S.FORM: Yofayof no TayPakayto Tingsikiw no 'Amis itokay. Onini a kasalalifet i, o pirayray to serangawan no 'Amis, naiti:ya ho tangasa i matini, mafiyorto ko icowacowa:ay a kiwkay, mapasadak to ko matiniay a likakawa, mara^ked mahacecay ko faloco' no singcia.
S.PHON: jo~ufajo~uf no~u tajpakajto~u tiŋsikiw no~u ʡamis ito~ukaj. o~unini a kasaɾaɾifət i, o~u pirajraj to~u səraŋawan no~u ʡamis, naiti:ja ħo~u taŋasa i matini, mafijo~urto~u ko~u iʦo~uwaʦo~uwa:aj a kiwkaj, mapasaɬ~ɮak to~u ko~u matiniaj a ɾikakawa, maraʔkəɬ~ɮ maħaʦəʦaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u siŋʦia.
